description: Composition Blue sleeveless top made of 100% viscose, has deep round neck, ruffle on neckline and centre front, slim tie belt at back and invisible zip at side Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash delicate cycle Do not bleach or tumble dry Cool iron This top has a lovely shimmery fabric which is smooth and cool - great for a sunny day. The ruffle makes this a feminine choice. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
